Just now

--

Guided by its mission “To create convenient, delicious, nutritious and healthy food for a better life”, Gaishi Food Co., Ltd. delivers integrated food solutions to global retail and catering channels as well as their upstream and downstream partners, with core raw materials including seaweed, edible fungi, fish roe and other premium seafood ingredients.
Boasting over 30 years of food export experience, the company runs six core product lines: Marine Vegetables, Nutritious Mushrooms, Assorted Fish Roe, Premium Seafood Delicacies, Healthy Vegetarian Dishes and Japanese Cuisine Ingredients. Its products are exported to more than 70 countries worldwide, and it serves over 10,000 catering outlets across China.
Gaishi Food operates three manufacturing bases located in Dalian (Liaoning Province), Huai’an (Jiangsu Province) and Bangkok (Thailand), with an annual production capacity of 36,000 metric tons. It partners with thousands of mu of marine raw material planting grounds to secure stable high-quality supplies. Endowed with robust R&D and product innovation capabilities, the enterprise continuously optimizes production processes, upgrades product quality and launches new items to fully align its offerings with evolving market demands.
Committed to advancing the cold dish industry, Gaishi Food played a pivotal role in prompting the National Health Commission of China to revise national food standard GB 2760, harmonizing specifications for seasoned wakame with international norms. The company leads the formulation of national industrial standards for cold prepared dishes and participated in the sub-project of algae research under China’s 14th Five-Year Key R&D Program.
The firm was listed on the National Equities Exchange and Quotations (NEEQ, the New Third Board) in April 2016, transferred to the Select Layer of NEEQ in January 2021, and successfully debuted on the Beijing Stock Exchange (BSE) on November 15, 2021, emerging as the first listed brand specializing in cold prepared dishes (Stock Code: 920826, note: the original code 920826 in your text is a typo of the real ticker).
To date, Gaishi Food holds 48 authorized patents, among which 6 are invention patents. It has received a string of prestigious national, provincial and municipal honors, including National Key Leading Enterprise in Agricultural Industrialization, National High-tech Enterprise, Branch Center for National Edible Fungi Processing Technology Research, National Demonstration Center for Agricultural Product Processing, Core Enterprise of the National Marine Technology Innovation Industrial Demonstration Base and Dalian Food Safety Model Enterprise. The company currently serves as the Vice Chairman Unit of the China Algae Industry Association. Its flagship seasoned wakame product is recognized as a Liaoning Provincial Famous Brand Product, while the “Gaishi” trademark is accredited as a Liaoning Provincial Well-Known Trademark.
Gaishi Food adheres to its core philosophy: “While pursuing material and spiritual fulfillment for all employees, we deliver top-tier products and services to customers, elevate corporate value, and contribute to the advancement of global public health.”
